docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,400.00 FILED BY O'CONNELL,WILLIAM V. AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON,SUSAN M. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-16-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF O'CONNELL,WILLIAM V. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ANDERSON,SUSAN M. $2,400.00 PRINCIPAL, $42.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,442.50, DEFT WAIVED IRREGULARITIES IN SERVICE OF CLAIM STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $2,256.85 AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON,SUSAN M.
CERT. LETTER TO SUSAN ANDERSON RETURNED UNCLAIMED.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
INVALID SERVICE AS TO DEFEND, NO NAME OF PARTY SERVED.
PETITION OF JUDGMENT CREDITOR TO SET ASIDE TERMS FOR PAYMENT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'CONNELL,WILLIAM V.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ANDERSON,SUSAN M.
ORDER TO SET ASIDE TERMS FILED BY PLAINTIFF O'CONNELL,WILLIAM V.
